risk_title: Political and Governance Risk - Substantial Rating Maintained

risk_title: Institutional Capacity Constraints in Northern Nigeria Context
risk_summary: Substantial institutional capacity risks persist despite project implementation, reflecting challenges in implementing agencies' ability to sustain landscape management coordination mechanisms and project management standards in a fragile governance environment.

risk_title: Fiduciary Risk Elevation in High-Risk Operating Environment
risk_summary: Fiduciary risk has been elevated to High, indicating increased vulnerability to governance and financial management challenges in the context of implementing large-scale disbursements ($251 million) across multiple states in northern Nigeria's fragile environment.
evidence_quote: Fiduciary [Risk Rating] Substantial [at Approval], High [Last Approved Rating ISR Seq. 04 - 06 May 2024]

risk_title: Environment and Social Stakeholder Risk Elevation
risk_summary: Environment and Social Stakeholder risks have escalated to High, suggesting emerging tensions or challenges in managing stakeholder engagement and social dynamics in project implementation areas, potentially linked to resource competition or displacement concerns in semi-arid landscapes.
